mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} AND password = #{password}
SELECT id, phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT id, phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM users
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status) VALUES (#{phone}, #{password}, #{username}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, password, username, email, avatar_url, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
username = #{username},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{userId}

UPDATE users
status = #{status},
updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.status, u.created_time AS createdTime, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name AS role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
